title: storage — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. HasFiles is the consumer-facing trait mixed into models that want polymorphic attachments. IsFile is a marker on the storage-owned File model itself (rarely composed elsewhere — exposed for testing + extension modules that need to reuse the File semantics under a different table).

owned.description: Mixed into any Eloquent model that wants attachments. Adds polymorphic morphMany relationships keyed by `kind` (from `#[Attachable]` on properties). Runtime helpers: `->files()` (all attached), `->filesOfKind($kind)`, `->fileOfKind($kind)` (single, latest by created_at), `->attachFile(UploadedFile|Filesystem $file, string $kind)`, `->detachFile(File $file)`. The trait discovers `#[Attachable]` properties at boot via reflection cached in the FileKindRegistry — zero runtime cost per read.
usedBy: future consumers (User avatar, WorkspaceContact document, Plan cover image, NewsletterIssue hero, WorkspaceIntegration cert bundle, etc)
owned.wraps: Extends the vendor's HasMedia trait + overrides its media() relationship to return our File model (which subclasses their Media). Media collections map to our `kind` field. Custom conversions register through the vendor's `registerMediaConversions()` hook. Our workspace scope is enforced via a global query scope + a `beforeAttach` boot hook that stamps `workspace_id` from the caller's RequestContext.

owned.description: Marker composed by the File model itself. Adds the runtime accessors (`->url()`, `->variantUrl($key)`, `->sha256()`, `->refCount()`) + hooks the observer lifecycle events. NOT for consumer models — they use HasFiles.

framework.reason: File, FileVariant, ChunkedUpload. NOT SignedUrlAudit (high volume, hard-purged on retention).

spatie.consumed_by: HasFiles — our HasFiles is a public rename + workspace-scoping shim over this vendor trait.
The vendor's contract our File model implements.

file.notes: Extends the spatie Media class internally. Public model API is our IsFile trait. Composes activity log so uploads / erasures land in the workspace activity feed.

file_variant.notes: No SoftDeletes / HasAuditable / HasActivityLog — variants are derivable from their parent File; on parent hard-delete cascade deletes. Regenerating a variant is idempotent.

signed_url_audit.notes: NO SoftDeletes / HasUserstamps / HasActivityLog — high-volume audit table with hard-purge retention. Every insert must be cheap (write-only path). No Eloquent update path — hits update via raw SQL increment for performance; revocations use a targeted UPDATE.

chunked_upload.notes: Ephemeral state (24h default TTL). SoftDeletes lets a client cancel an upload + observe the state for a short retention window before hard-purge by PurgeAbortedChunkedUploadsJob.
